title: dendrorkis paulensis
side_effects: Dendrorkis paulensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, or respiratory problems due to its toxic compounds. Ingesting the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged exposure to its extracts can also cause liver and kidney damage, as well as increased heart rate and blood pressure. Additionally, improper use of Dendrorkis paulensis can lead to interactions with other medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
